sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8381" key="a)nepiqu/mhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνεπι-θύμητος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῡ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8381.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without desire,</tr_> opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπιθυμητικός,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.6.14</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2424.tlg001:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chaerem.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
